info.title: HIV.B HTS visit API
info.description: This tab describes the data that are collected during the HIV Testing services visit workflow (HIV.B)

get.summary: JSON Schema definition for the Logical Model StructureDefinition-HIVBHTSvisit
get.description: This endpoint serves the JSON Schema definition for the Logical Model StructureDefinition-HIVBHTSvisit.

StructureDefinition-HIVBHTSvisit.title: HIV.B HTS visit
StructureDefinition-HIVBHTSvisit.description: This tab describes the data that are collected during the HIV Testing services visit workflow (HIV.B)

resourceType.description: Resource type identifier for HIVBHTSvisit logical model

@context.description: JSON-LD context for this logical model with ValueSet vocabularies

anyOf.description: URI reference to external JSON-LD context

@type.description: JSON-LD type identifier for HIVBHTSvisit logical model
JSON-LD type reference to ValueSet HIV.B.DE1

items.description: Coding from ValueSet HIV.B.DE1. Supports both FHIR Coding structure and JSON-LD structure.
